title: Configuration
subtitle: Hierarchical policy & preference settings — global → tenant → plant, with cascade, override and audit.

groupDesc.objective: The engine objective-function weights (lateness, changeover, overtime, …) — a scheduling policy.
groupDesc.reporting: The trailing window over which continuous plant-performance KPIs are reported — a reporting policy.
groupDesc.autonomy: The learning gate's confidence threshold + tier behavior + snooze thresholds.

notLive.objective: The Objective Policy weights (+ the firm-lateness-dominance guard) come through the framework next.
notLive.autonomy: Autonomy config stays on its own screen for now (tenant-level); it migrates into the framework opportunistically. Edit it under Objective policy.

scopeHint.global: The shipped default floor (read-only). Tenant and plant overrides cascade on top.
scopeHint.tenant: Your tenant's house default — applies to every plant unless a plant overrides it.
scopeHint.plant: This plant's own setting — the most specific; overrides the tenant and global.

row.globalReadOnly: Global is the shipped default — read-only here.
